name: Wuyan

skills.name: Petrifying Strike
skills.description: Skills and Basic Attacks have a chance to petrify enemy heroes.

skills.name: Storm and Stress
skills.description: Dashes to the target location and enhances the next Basic Attack to inflict extra damage and slow.

skills.name: Shock and Awe
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in the specified area.

skills.name: Hurricane Hammer
skills.description: Swings the hammer for a period of time, continuously dealing damage to nearby enemies in range. Gains increased Movement Speed and a shield while the skill is used. Passive: Grants shield periodically.

tips: Wuyan (Tank): Tier B on international ranked — 50.81% WR.
Build core: Patrol Axe, Lightfoot Shoes, Blazing Cape.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.81%, pick 0.41%, ban 0.03%, popularity tier B.
Counters Kongming, Lady Zhen, Liang · Weak into Lam, Ming, Pei.

faqs.question: Is Wuyan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Wuyan is Tier B Tank with 50.81% win rate, 0.41% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Wuyan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Patrol Axe, Lightfoot Shoes, Blazing Cape, Nettle Gauntlet, Boots of Resistance, Frostscar's Embrace. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Wuyan?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Wuyan: Lam, Ming, Pei. Wuyan is strong into Kongming, Lady Zhen, Liang.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Kongming, Lady Zhen, Liang. Countered by: Lam, Ming, Pei.
